name: Shaurya SBI Card
exclusions: transactions excluded under Shaurya SBI Card terms
milestoneBenefits: Renewal fee waiver on annual spends of Rs 50,000 or more in the preceding year
additionalBenefits: 1,000 Reward Points on payment of joining fee
5 Reward Points per Rs 100 on CSD, dining, movies, departmental stores and grocery spends
1 Reward Point per Rs 100 on other eligible non-fuel retail purchases
Personal accident insurance cover of Rs 2 lakh, subject to policy terms
Card can be embossed with service branch such as Army, Navy, Air Force or Paramilitary
1% fuel surcharge waiver on eligible fuel transactions from Rs 500 to Rs 3,000, capped at Rs 100 per month

salaried: Designed for eligible serving or retired defence and paramilitary personnel
